div.div: Casual, Indie, Massively Multiplayer, Simulation, Free To Play
Homo Liberans: The Savior of Humanity
Prevent Terminal Fort Knot from falling victim to a voidout.
Defeat the Lord of the Tar Lake.
Complete 10 deliveries, 10 recoveries, 10 elimination/destruction standard orders with an S rank in Casual difficulty or above.
Build every structure type, including tools, deployable shields, electric traps and any sign.
The Scars Left by the Giants
Arrive at the BT nexus in the F3 crater.
The Real Story of the Ghost Hunter
Plant a Spinelily, Lashleaf, Bouncevine, Wheezeweed, Thistlewhip, Popcoral and Daggeroot seed.
Use the Probe Scanner to find one of the mysterious Vintage Probes.
Acquired all legendary sorceries and incantations
Total War: ROME II - Emperor Edition
Win 50 land battles during campaign play.
Win 25 siege attack battles during campaign play.
Win a campaign battle, using only cavalry units, without auto-resolving.
Successfully defend a city without losing a single victory point during a campaign battle.
Awarded for hunting 100 large master rank monsters.
An easy-to-deploy camping kit. Awarded for unlocking a lot of camps in the Jungle and Citadel.
Awarded for riding Canynes many times. Worn in odd places from use on countless voyages.
Awarded for forging many a layered armor. Its variegated hues are simply captivating.
A helm with golden hollows and blue wings. Awarded for forging even more valuable layered armor.
Toys of a cuddling Felyne and Canyne. Awarded to avid instructors at the Buddy Dojo.
Awarded for performing 1000 Wiredashes. Spins smoothly in the wind.
Super popular in the Tea Shop! Awarded for helping make new dango, even in far-off Elgado.
A decorative fan awarded to those who vanquished the crimson-glowing threat to the village.
A pretty great winged helmet. Awarded for forging even more valuable weapons and armor.
Casual, Free To Play, Indie, Strategy
Reach Z30 with no respec and 60 or less He spent
Complete the Dimension of Anger before buying Bounty
Be decorated with the Order of Vitis Vinifera.
Be given Aerondight by the Lady of the Lake.
Obtain a flawless victory in all the competitions during the knights' tourney.
Unlock the bonus for equipping all the witcher gear elements from one School.
Find all grandmaster diagrams for each witcher school.
Collect all the cards in the Skellige deck.
Destroy all monster nests in the Velen / Novigrad region, or in Skellige.
Use all available options for developing Corvo Bianco.
Homo Liberans: The Savior of Humanity
Prevent Terminal Fort Knot from falling victim to a voidout.
Defeat the Lord of the Tar Lake.
Complete 10 deliveries, 10 recoveries, 10 elimination/destruction standard orders with an S rank in Casual difficulty or above.
Build every structure type, including tools, deployable shields, electric traps and any sign.
The Scars Left by the Giants
Arrive at the BT nexus in the F3 crater.
The Real Story of the Ghost Hunter
Find the Ultimate Ultra Overkill Relic.
Activate lots and lots of Crawler trigger abilities.
Reach a high Level with Giovanna Grana.
Recover lots and lots of HP.
Find the Coffin in Milk Factory.
Casual, Indie, Massively Multiplayer, Simulation, Free To Play
